tools.name: Suno
tools.description: Leading AI music generator that creates complete songs with vocals, lyrics, and full production from a single text prompt in under a minute.
tools.referrals: yes - invite friends to join the community.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Shared queue, 4 concurrent generations, standard priority (30s-5min wait). Credits do not roll over.
free_tier_limits.notes: Only v4.5-all model on free. No commercial use. 128kbps MP3 only. Upload up to 8 min audio.

tools.notes: V5.5 with voice cloning and custom models locked to paid. Sony/UMG lawsuits pending. Pro $8/mo for commercial use.

tools.name: Udio
tools.description: AI-powered platform that transforms text or lyrics into complete songs with vocals and instrumentals using latent diffusion transformer.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 10 credit daily cap. Credits don't roll over. Public only. Generates 2 versions per prompt.
free_tier_limits.notes: No commercial use on free. Downloads currently disabled pending relaunch. 48kHz stereo up to 10 min on paid.

tools.notes: Commercial use requires Pro ($30/mo). Downloads disabled pending co-licensed UMG platform relaunch.

tools.name: ACE-Step
tools.description: AI song generator creating full songs with vocals and instrumentation in ~20 seconds. Built on ACE Studio's open-source foundation model.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Max 120s duration, personal use only, 120kbps MP3. Each generation costs 5-10 credits.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free tier personal use only — no commercial rights. Paid from $5.33/mo. Apache 2.0 open-source, can run locally.

tools.notes: Free web frontend for ACE Studio's open-source model. Desktop app ACE Studio ($398-$528 lifetime) has 140+ voices but no free tier.

tools.name: SoundGen
tools.description: AI music platform with full multi-track DAW, stem separation, voice cloning, and pro mixing/mastering. Uses ElevenLabs models.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Each generation costs 10 credits (~30s audio). Credits never expire.
free_tier_limits.notes: 50 one-time credits on signup. No credit card required. Credits never expire. One-time credit packs available.

tools.notes: Uses ElevenLabs models. Full multi-track DAW with 16 effects. Web and Mac desktop app. Credits never expire.

tools.name: Niew.ai
tools.description: Free AI music generator with dual models (V1/V2), text-to-song, lyrics-to-song, AI covers, and music video creation. Up to 8 min songs.
tools.referrals: yes - Invite & Earn program for extra credits.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: All AI models and styles unlocked. Songs limited to shorter lengths on free. No WAV/MP3 download.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free plan: 6 credits total for ~2 songs (not daily). No commercial rights. VIP $14/mo for full commercial.

tools.notes: Free tier very limited — 6 credits for ~2 songs total. Edge: 8-min song length and dual models. Compare: Suno 50 credits/day, Udio 10.

tools.name: Mureka
tools.description: AI music platform with Chain-of-Thought (MusiCoT) architecture. Song generation, voice cloning, MIDI export, stem separation, and developer API.
tools.referrals: yes - affiliate program via Rewardful. Earn commissions on new paying customers. 60-day payout delay.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 4 songs/day max. MP3 only. No downloads. No commercial rights. No stems. v7.5 model only.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free outputs belong to Mureka per ToS (non-commercial only). No access to V9, V8, O2, V7.6 on free. Must regenerate on paid for commercial use.

tools.notes: MusiCoT architecture plans song structure globally before generating. Supports 10 languages. Pro $9/mo (500 songs), Premier $27/mo (2000 songs, WAV, stems, MIDI). iOS/Android apps.

tools.name: MeloLab
tools.description: AI music platform with multiple models (ACE Step, Suno, MiniMax, Lyria, HeartMuLa, Mureka). Text-to-song, AI covers, stem separation, multi-track DAW.

free_tier_limits.free_songs_per_day: ~2 Suno songs or up to 10 ACE Step songs
free_tier_limits.rate_limits: 1 concurrent generation. Song storage 7 days. Credits vary: ACE Step = 1cr, Lyria/HeartMuLa = 3cr, Suno = 4cr, MiniMax = 5cr.
free_tier_limits.notes: All text-to-music models available on free. Personal use only. No commercial license. Studio features (Inpaint, Outpaint, Stems) included on free.

tools.notes: Free tier gives access to ALL models but limited to 10 credits/month. ACE Step 1.5 most cost-effective (1 credit). Songs stored 7 days on free.

tools.name: Stable Audio
tools.description: Stability AI's text-to-audio platform generating instrumental music and sound effects using proprietary audio diffusion models. Open-weight models available.

free_tier_limits.rate_limits: Monthly reset, no rollover. Non-commercial only, watermarked.
free_tier_limits.notes: Free credits unavailable in some regions. Pro $11.99/mo for commercial + 500 tracks.

tools.notes: Backed by Stability AI. Pro $11.99/mo (500 tracks), Studio $29.99/mo (675 tracks). Open-weight models on HuggingFace for self-hosting.
